NAME
    Add-PodeOAInfo
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates an OpenAPI metadata.
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodeOAInfo [[-Title] <String>] [[-Version] <String>] [[-Description] <String>] [[-TermsOfService] 
    <String>] [[-LicenseName] <String>] [[-LicenseUrl] <String>] [[-ContactName] <String>] [[-ContactEmail] 
    <String>] [[-ContactUrl] <String>] [[-DefinitionTag] <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Creates an OpenAPI metadata like TermOfService, license and so on.
    The metadata MAY be used by the clients if needed, and MAY be presented in editing or documentation 
    generation tools for convenience.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Title <String>
        The Title of the API.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Version <String>
        The Version of the API.
        The OpenAPI Specification is versioned using Semantic Versioning 2.0.0 (semver) and follows the 
        semver specification.
        https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    2
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Description <String>
        A short description of the API.
        CommonMark syntax MAY be used for rich text representation.
        https://spec.commonmark.org/
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    3
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -TermsOfService <String>
        A URL to the Terms of Service for the API. MUST be in the format of a URL.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    4
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -LicenseName <String>
        The license name used for the API.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    5
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -LicenseUrl <String>
        A URL to the license used for the API. MUST be in the format of a URL.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    6
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ContactName <String>
        The identifying name of the contact person/organization.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    7
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ContactEmail <String>
        The email address of the contact person/organization. MUST be in the format of an email address.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    8
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ContactUrl <String>
        The URL pointing to the contact information. MUST be in the format of a URL.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    9
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -DefinitionTag <String>
        A string representing the unique tag for the API specification.
        This tag helps distinguish between different versions or types of API specifications within the 
        application.
        You can use this tag to reference the specific API documentation, schema, or version that your 
        function interacts with.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    10
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeOAInfo -TermsOfService 'http://swagger.io/terms/' -License 'Apache 2.0' -LicenseUrl 
    'http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html' -ContactName 'API Support' -ContactEmail 
    'apiteam@swagger.io' -ContactUrl 'http://example.com/support'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    Add-PodeOAResponse
    
SYNOPSIS
    Adds a response definition to the supplied route.
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodeOAResponse [-Route] <Hashtable[]> -StatusCode <String> [-Content <Hashtable>] [-Headers <Object>] 
    [-Description <String>] [-Links <OrderedDictionary>] [-PassThru] [-DefinitionTag <String[]>] 
    [<CommonParameters>]
    
    Add-PodeOAResponse [-Route] <Hashtable[]> -StatusCode <String> [-Headers <Object>] -Reference <String> 
    [-PassThru] [-DefinitionTag <String[]>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    Add-PodeOAResponse [-Route] <Hashtable[]> [-Content <Hashtable>] [-Headers <Object>] [-Description 
    <String>] -Default [-Links <OrderedDictionary>] [-PassThru] [-DefinitionTag <String[]>] 
    [<CommonParameters>]
    
    Add-PodeOAResponse [-Route] <Hashtable[]> [-Headers <Object>] [-Reference <String>] -Default [-PassThru] 
    [-DefinitionTag <String[]>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Adds a response definition to the supplied route.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Route <Hashtable[]>
        The route to add the response definition, usually from -PassThru on Add-PodeRoute.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       true (ByValue)
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -StatusCode <String>
        The HTTP StatusCode for the response.To define a range of response codes, this field MAY contain the 
        uppercase wildcard character `X`.
        For example, `2XX` represents all response codes between `[200-299]`. Only the following range 
        definitions are allowed: `1XX`, `2XX`, `3XX`, `4XX`, and `5XX`.
        If a response is defined using an explicit code, the explicit code definition takes precedence over 
        the range definition for that code.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Content <Hashtable>
        The content-types and schema the response returns (the schema is created using the Property 
        functions).
        Alias: ContentSchemas
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Headers <Object>
        The header name and schema the response returns (the schema is created using 
        Add-PodeOAComponentHeader cmd-let).
        Alias: HeaderSchemas
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Description <String>
        A Description of the response. (Default: the HTTP StatusCode description)
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Reference <String>
        A Reference Name of an existing component response to use.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Default [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the response will be used as a default response - this overrides the StatusCode supplied.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Links <OrderedDictionary>
        A Response link definition
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -PassThru [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the route passed in will be returned for further chaining.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -DefinitionTag <String[]>
        An Array of strings representing the unique tag for the API specification.
        This tag helps distinguish between different versions or types of API specifications within the 
        application.
        You can use this tag to reference the specific API documentation, schema, or version that your 
        function interacts with.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable[]
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeRoute -PassThru | Add-PodeOAResponse -StatusCode 200 -Content @{ 'application/json' = 
    (New-PodeOAIntProperty -Name 'userId' -Object) }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeRoute -PassThru | Add-PodeOAResponse -StatusCode 200 -Content @{ 'application/json' = 
    'UserIdSchema' }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeRoute -PassThru | Add-PodeOAResponse -StatusCode 200 -Reference 'OKResponse'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    Add-PodeOAServerEndpoint
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates an OpenAPI Server Object.
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodeOAServerEndpoint [-Url] <String> [[-Description] <String>] [[-Variables] <OrderedDictionary>] 
    [[-DefinitionTag] <String[]>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Creates an OpenAPI Server Object.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Url <String>
        A URL to the target host.  This URL supports Server Variables and MAY be relative, to indicate that 
        the host location is relative to the location where the OpenAPI document is being served.
        Variable substitutions will be made when a variable is named in `{`brackets`}`.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Description <String>
        An optional string describing the host designated by the URL. [CommonMark 
        syntax](https://spec.commonmark.org/) MAY be used for rich text representation.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    2
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Variables <OrderedDictionary>
        A map between a variable name and its value.  The value is used for substitution in the server's URL 
        template.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    3
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -DefinitionTag <String[]>
        An Array of strings representing the unique tag for the API specification.
        This tag helps distinguish between different versions or types of API specifications within the 
        application.
        You can use this tag to reference the specific API documentation, schema, or version that your 
        function interacts with.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    4
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeOAServerEndpoint -Url 'https://myserver.io/api' -Description 'My test server'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeOAServerEndpoint -Url '/api' -Description 'My local server'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeOAServerEndpoint -Url "https://{username}.gigantic-server.com:{port}/{basePath}" 
    -Description "The production API server" `
    
    -Variable   @{
            username = @{
                default = 'demo'
                description = 'this value is assigned by the service provider, in this example 
    gigantic-server.com'
            }
            port = @{
                enum = @('System.Object[]') # Assuming 'System.Object[]' is a placeholder for actual values
                default = 8443
            }
            basePath = @{
                default = 'v2'
            }
        }
    }
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    Add-PodeOATag
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a OpenAPI Tag reference property.
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodeOATag [-Name] <String> [[-Description] <String>] [[-ExternalDoc] <OrderedDictionary>] 
    [[-DefinitionTag] <String[]>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Creates a new OpenAPI tag reference.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Name <String>
        The Name of the tag.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Description <String>
        A Description of the tag.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    2
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ExternalDoc <OrderedDictionary>
        If supplied, the tag references an existing external documentation reference.
        The parameter is created by Add-PodeOAExternalDoc
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    3
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -DefinitionTag <String[]>
        An Array of strings representing the unique tag for the API specification.
        This tag helps distinguish between different versions or types of API specifications within the 
        application.
        You can use this tag to reference the specific API documentation, schema, or version that your 
        function interacts with.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    4
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeOATag -Name 'store' -Description 'Access to Petstore orders' -ExternalDoc 'SwaggerDocs'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    Add-PodeOAWebhook
    
SYNOPSIS
    Sets metadate for the supplied route.
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodeOAWebhook [-Name] <String> [-Method] <String> [-PassThru] [[-DefinitionTag] <String[]>] 
    [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Sets metadate for the supplied route, such as Summary and Tags.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Name <String>
        Alias for 'Name'. A unique identifier for the webhook.
        It must be a valid string of alphanumeric characters, periods (.), hyphens (-), and underscores (_).
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Method <String>
        The HTTP Method of this Route, multiple can be supplied.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    2
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -PassThru [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the route passed in will be returned for further chaining.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -DefinitionTag <String[]>
        An Array of strings representing the unique tag for the API specification.
        This tag helps distinguish between different versions or types of API specifications within the 
        application.
        You can use this tag to reference the specific API documentation, schema, or version that your 
        function interacts with.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    3
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeOAWebhook -PassThru -Method Get    |
    
    Set-PodeOARouteInfo -Summary 'Find pets by ID' -Description 'Returns pets based on ID'  -OperationId 
    'getPetsById' -PassThru |
            Set-PodeOARequest -PassThru -Parameters @(
            (New-PodeOAStringProperty -Name 'id' -Description 'ID of pet to use' -array | 
    ConvertTo-PodeOAParameter -In Path -Style Simple -Required )) |
            Add-PodeOAResponse -StatusCode 200 -Description 'pet response'   -Content (@{ '*/*' = 
    New-PodeOASchemaProperty   -ComponentSchema 'Pet' -array }) -PassThru |
            Add-PodeOAResponse -Default  -Description 'error payload' -Content (@{'text/html' = 'ErrorModel' 
    }) -PassThru
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    Add-PodePage
    
SYNOPSIS
    Helper function to generate simple GET routes.
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodePage -Name <String> -ScriptBlock <ScriptBlock> [-Data <Hashtable>] [-Path <String>] [-Middleware 
    <Object[]>] [-Authentication <String>] [-Access <String>] [-Role <String[]>] [-Group <String[]>] [-Scope 
    <String[]>] [-User <String[]>] [-AllowAnon] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    Add-PodePage -Name <String> -FilePath <String> [-Data <Hashtable>] [-Path <String>] [-Middleware 
    <Object[]>] [-Authentication <String>] [-Access <String>] [-Role <String[]>] [-Group <String[]>] [-Scope 
    <String[]>] [-User <String[]>] [-AllowAnon] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    Add-PodePage -Name <String> -View <String> [-Data <Hashtable>] [-Path <String>] [-Middleware <Object[]>] 
    [-Authentication <String>] [-Access <String>] [-Role <String[]>] [-Group <String[]>] [-Scope <String[]>] 
    [-User <String[]>] [-AllowAnon] [-FlashMessages] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Helper function to generate simple GET routes from ScriptBlocks, Files, and Views.
    The output is always rendered as HTML.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Name <String>
        A unique name for the page, that will be used in the Path for the route.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ScriptBlock <ScriptBlock>
        A ScriptBlock to invoke, where any results will be converted to HTML.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -FilePath <String>
        A FilePath, literal or relative, to a valid HTML file.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -View <String>
        The name of a View to render, this can be HTML or Dynamic.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Data <Hashtable>
        A hashtable of Data to supply to a Dynamic File/View, or to be splatted as arguments for the 
        ScriptBlock.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Path <String>
        An optional Path for the Route, to prepend before the Name.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                /
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Middleware <Object[]>
        Like normal Routes, an array of Middleware that will be applied to all generated Routes.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Authentication <String>
        The name of an Authentication method which should be used as middleware on this Route.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Access <String>
        The name of an Access method which should be used as middleware on this Route.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Role <String[]>
        One or more optional Roles that will be authorised to access this Route, when using Authentication 
        with an Access method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Group <String[]>
        One or more optional Groups that will be authorised to access this Route, when using Authentication 
        with an Access method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Scope <String[]>
        One or more optional Scopes that will be authorised to access this Route, when using Authentication 
        with an Access method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -User <String[]>
        One or more optional Users that will be authorised to access this Route, when using Authentication 
        with an Access method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -AllowAnon [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the Page will allow anonymous access for non-authenticated users.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -FlashMessages [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, Views will have any flash messages supplied to them for rendering.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodePage -Name Services -ScriptBlock { Get-Service }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodePage -Name Index -View 'index'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodePage -Name About -FilePath '.\views\about.pode' -Data @{ Date = [DateTime]::UtcNow }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    Add-PodeRoute
    
SYNOPSIS
    Adds a Route for a specific HTTP Method(s).
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodeRoute -Method <String[]> -Path <String> [-Middleware <Object[]>] [-ScriptBlock <ScriptBlock>] 
    [-EndpointName <String[]>] [-ContentType <String>] [-TransferEncoding <String>] [-ErrorContentType 
    <String>] [-ArgumentList <Object[]>] [-Authentication <String>] [-Access <String>] [-IfExists <String>] 
    [-Role <String[]>] [-Group <String[]>] [-Scope <String[]>] [-User <String[]>] [-AllowAnon] [-Login] 
    [-Logout] [-OAResponses <Hashtable>] [-OAReference <String>] [-PassThru] [-OADefinitionTag <String[]>] 
    [<CommonParameters>]
    
    Add-PodeRoute -Method <String[]> -Path <String> [-Middleware <Object[]>] [-EndpointName <String[]>] 
    [-ContentType <String>] [-TransferEncoding <String>] [-ErrorContentType <String>] -FilePath <String> 
    [-ArgumentList <Object[]>] [-Authentication <String>] [-Access <String>] [-IfExists <String>] [-Role 
    <String[]>] [-Group <String[]>] [-Scope <String[]>] [-User <String[]>] [-AllowAnon] [-Login] [-Logout] 
    [-OAResponses <Hashtable>] [-OAReference <String>] [-PassThru] [-OADefinitionTag <String[]>] 
    [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Adds a Route for a specific HTTP Method(s), with path, that when called with invoke any logic and/or 
    Middleware.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Method <String[]>
        The HTTP Method of this Route, multiple can be supplied.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Path <String>
        The URI path for the Route.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Middleware <Object[]>
        An array of ScriptBlocks for optional Middleware.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ScriptBlock <ScriptBlock>
        A ScriptBlock for the Route's main logic.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -EndpointName <String[]>
        The EndpointName of an Endpoint(s) this Route should be bound against.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ContentType <String>
        The content type the Route should use when parsing any payloads.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -TransferEncoding <String>
        The transfer encoding the Route should use when parsing any payloads.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ErrorContentType <String>
        The content type of any error pages that may get returned.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -FilePath <String>
        A literal, or relative, path to a file containing a ScriptBlock for the Route's main logic.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ArgumentList <Object[]>
        An array of arguments to supply to the Route's ScriptBlock.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Authentication <String>
        The name of an Authentication method which should be used as middleware on this Route.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Access <String>
        The name of an Access method which should be used as middleware on this Route.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -IfExists <String>
        Specifies what action to take when a Route already exists. (Default: Default)
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                Default
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Role <String[]>
        One or more optional Roles that will be authorised to access this Route, when using Authentication 
        with an Access method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Group <String[]>
        One or more optional Groups that will be authorised to access this Route, when using Authentication 
        with an Access method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Scope <String[]>
        One or more optional Scopes that will be authorised to access this Route, when using Authentication 
        with an Access method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -User <String[]>
        One or more optional Users that will be authorised to access this Route, when using Authentication 
        with an Access method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -AllowAnon [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the Route will allow anonymous access for non-authenticated users.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Login [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the Route will be flagged to Authentication as being a Route that handles user logins.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Logout [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the Route will be flagged to Authentication as being a Route that handles users logging 
        out.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -OAResponses <Hashtable>
        An alternative way to associate OpenApi responses using New-PodeOAResponse instead of piping multiple 
        Add-PodeOAResponse
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -OAReference <String>
        A reference to OpenAPI reusable pathItem component created with Add-PodeOAComponentPathItem
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -PassThru [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the route created will be returned so it can be passed through a pipe.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -OADefinitionTag <String[]>
        An Array of strings representing the unique tag for the API specification.
        This tag helps in distinguishing between different versions or types of API specifications within the 
        application.
        You can use this tag to reference the specific API documentation, schema, or version that your 
        function interacts with.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Object[]
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeRoute -Method Get -Path '/' -ScriptBlock { /* logic */ }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeRoute -Method Post -Path '/users/:userId/message' -Middleware (Get-PodeCsrfMiddleware) 
    -ScriptBlock { /* logic */ }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeRoute -Method Post -Path '/user' -ContentType 'application/json' -ScriptBlock { /* logic 
    */ }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 4 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeRoute -Method Post -Path '/user' -ContentType 'application/json' -TransferEncoding gzip 
    -ScriptBlock { /* logic */ }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 5 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeRoute -Method Get -Path '/api/cpu' -ErrorContentType 'application/json' -ScriptBlock { /* 
    logic */ }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 6 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeRoute -Method Get -Path '/' -ScriptBlock { /* logic */ } -ArgumentList 'arg1', 'arg2'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 7 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeRoute -Method Get -Path '/' -Role 'Developer', 'QA' -ScriptBlock { /* logic */ }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 8 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>$Responses = New-PodeOAResponse -StatusCode 400 -Description 'Invalid username supplied' |
    
    New-PodeOAResponse -StatusCode 404 -Description 'User not found' |
                New-PodeOAResponse -StatusCode 405 -Description 'Invalid Input'
    
    Add-PodeRoute -PassThru -Method Put -Path '/user/:username' -OAResponses $Responses -ScriptBlock {
                #code is going here
            }
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    Add-PodeRouteGroup
    
SYNOPSIS
    Add a Route Group for multiple Routes.
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodeRouteGroup [[-Path] <String>] [-Routes] <ScriptBlock> [[-Middleware] <Object[]>] [[-EndpointName] 
    <String[]>] [[-ContentType] <String>] [[-TransferEncoding] <String>] [[-ErrorContentType] <String>] 
    [[-Authentication] <String>] [[-Access] <String>] [[-IfExists] <String>] [[-Role] <String[]>] [[-Group] 
    <String[]>] [[-Scope] <String[]>] [[-User] <String[]>] [-AllowAnon] [[-OADefinitionTag] <String[]>] 
    [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Add a Route Group for sharing values between multiple Routes.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Path <String>
        The URI path to use as a base for the Routes, that should be prepended.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Routes <ScriptBlock>
        A ScriptBlock for adding Routes.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    2
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Middleware <Object[]>
        An array of ScriptBlocks for optional Middleware to give each Route.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    3
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -EndpointName <String[]>
        The EndpointName of an Endpoint(s) to use for the Routes.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    4
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ContentType <String>
        The content type to use for the Routes, when parsing any payloads.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    5
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -TransferEncoding <String>
        The transfer encoding to use for the Routes, when parsing any payloads.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    6
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ErrorContentType <String>
        The content type of any error pages that may get returned.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    7
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Authentication <String>
        The name of an Authentication method which should be used as middleware on the Routes.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    8
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Access <String>
        The name of an Access method which should be used as middleware on this Route.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    9
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -IfExists <String>
        Specifies what action to take when a Route already exists. (Default: Default)
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    10
        Default value                Default
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Role <String[]>
        One or more optional Roles that will be authorised to access this Route, when using Authentication 
        with an Access method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    11
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Group <String[]>
        One or more optional Groups that will be authorised to access this Route, when using Authentication 
        with an Access method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    12
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Scope <String[]>
        One or more optional Scopes that will be authorised to access this Route, when using Authentication 
        with an Access method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    13
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -User <String[]>
        One or more optional Users that will be authorised to access this Route, when using Authentication 
        with an Access method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    14
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -AllowAnon [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the Routes will allow anonymous access for non-authenticated users.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -OADefinitionTag <String[]>
        An Array of strings representing the unique tag for the API specification.
        This tag helps in distinguishing between different versions or types of API specifications within the 
        application.
        You can use this tag to reference the specific API documentation, schema, or version that your 
        function interacts with.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    15
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeRouteGroup -Path '/api' -Routes { Add-PodeRoute -Path '/route1' -Etc }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    Add-PodeSchedule
    
SYNOPSIS
    Adds a new Schedule with logic to periodically invoke, defined using Cron Expressions.
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodeSchedule -Name <String> -Cron <String[]> -ScriptBlock <ScriptBlock> [-Limit <Int32>] [-StartTime 
    <DateTime>] [-EndTime <DateTime>] [-ArgumentList <Hashtable>] [-Timeout <Int32>] [-TimeoutFrom <String>] 
    [-OnStart] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    Add-PodeSchedule -Name <String> -Cron <String[]> [-Limit <Int32>] [-StartTime <DateTime>] [-EndTime 
    <DateTime>] -FilePath <String> [-ArgumentList <Hashtable>] [-Timeout <Int32>] [-TimeoutFrom <String>] 
    [-OnStart] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Adds a new Schedule with logic to periodically invoke, defined using Cron Expressions.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Name <String>
        The Name of the Schedule.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Cron <String[]>
        One, or an Array, of Cron Expressions to define when the Schedule should trigger.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ScriptBlock <ScriptBlock>
        The script defining the Schedule's logic.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Limit <Int32>
        The number of times the Schedule should trigger before being removed.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -StartTime <DateTime>
        A DateTime for when the Schedule should start triggering.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -EndTime <DateTime>
        A DateTime for when the Schedule should stop triggering, and be removed.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -FilePath <String>
        A literal, or relative, path to a file containing a ScriptBlock for the Schedule's logic.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ArgumentList <Hashtable>
        A hashtable of arguments to supply to the Schedule's ScriptBlock.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Timeout <Int32>
        An optional timeout, in seconds, for the Schedule's logic. (Default: -1 [never timeout])
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                -1
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -TimeoutFrom <String>
        An optional timeout from either 'Create' or 'Start'. (Default: 'Create')
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                Create
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -OnStart [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the schedule will trigger when the server starts, regardless if the cron-expression 
        matches the current time.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeSchedule -Name 'RunEveryMinute' -Cron '@minutely' -ScriptBlock { /* logic */ }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeSchedule -Name 'RunEveryTuesday' -Cron '0 0 * * TUE' -ScriptBlock { /* logic */ }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeSchedule -Name 'StartAfter2days' -Cron '@hourly' -StartTime [DateTime]::Now.AddDays(2) 
    -ScriptBlock { /* logic */ }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 4 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeSchedule -Name 'Args' -Cron '@minutely' -ScriptBlock { /* logic */ } -ArgumentList @{ Arg1 
    = 'value' }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    Add-PodeScopedVariable
    
SYNOPSIS
    Adds a new Scoped Variable.
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodeScopedVariable -Name <String> -GetReplace <String> [-SetReplace <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    Add-PodeScopedVariable -Name <String> -ScriptBlock <ScriptBlock> [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Adds a new Scoped Variable, to make calling certain functions simpler.
    For example "$state:Name" instead of "Get-PodeState" and "Set-PodeState".
    

PARAMETERS
    -Name <String>
        The Name of the Scoped Variable.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -GetReplace <String>
        A template to be used when converting "$var = $SV:<name>" to a "Get-SVValue -Name <name>" syntax.
        You can use the "{{name}}" placeholder to show where the <name> would be placed in the conversion. 
        The result will also be automatically wrapped in brackets.
        For example, "$var = $state:<name>" to "Get-PodeState -Name <name>" would need a GetReplace value of 
        "Get-PodeState -Name '{{name}}'".
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -SetReplace <String>
        An optional template to be used when converting "$SV:<name> = <value>" to a "Set-SVValue -Name <name> 
        -Value <value>" syntax.
        You can use the "{{name}}" placeholder to show where the <name> would be placed in the conversion. 
        The <value> will automatically be appended to the end.
        For example, "$state:<name> = <value>" to "Set-PodeState -Name <name> -Value <value>" would need a 
        SetReplace value of "Set-PodeState -Name '{{name}}' -Value ".
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ScriptBlock <ScriptBlock>
        For more advanced conversions, that aren't as simple as a simple find/replace, you can supply a 
        ScriptBlock instead.
        This ScriptBlock will be supplied ScriptBlock to convert, followed by a SessionState object, and the 
        Get/Set regex patterns, as parameters.
        The ScriptBlock should returned a converted ScriptBlock that works, plus an optional array of values 
        that should be supplied to the ScriptBlock when invoked.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeScopedVariable -Name 'cache' -SetReplace "Set-PodeCache -Key '{{name}}' -InputObject " 
    -GetReplace "Get-PodeCache -Key '{{name}}'"
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeScopedVariable -Name 'config' -ScriptBlock {
    
    param($ScriptBlock, $SessionState, $GetPattern, $SetPattern)
        $strScriptBlock = "$($ScriptBlock)"
        $template = "(Get-PodeConfig).'{{name}}'"
    
        # allows "$port = $config:port" instead of "$port = (Get-PodeConfig).port"
        while ($strScriptBlock -imatch $GetPattern) {
            $getReplace = $template.Replace('{{name}}', $Matches['name'])
            $strScriptBlock = $strScriptBlock.Replace($Matches['full'], "($($getReplace))")
        }
    
        return [scriptblock]::Create($strScriptBlock)
    }
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    Add-PodeSecurityContentSecurityPolicy
    
SYNOPSIS
    Adds additional values to already defined values for the Content-Security-Policy header.
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodeSecurityContentSecurityPolicy [[-Default] <String[]>] [[-Child] <String[]>] [[-Connect] 
    <String[]>] [[-Font] <String[]>] [[-Frame] <String[]>] [[-Image] <String[]>] [[-Manifest] <String[]>] 
    [[-Media] <String[]>] [[-Object] <String[]>] [[-Scripts] <String[]>] [[-Style] <String[]>] [[-BaseUri] 
    <String[]>] [[-FormAction] <String[]>] [[-FrameAncestor] <String[]>] [[-FencedFrame] <String[]>] 
    [[-Prefetch] <String[]>] [[-ScriptAttr] <String[]>] [[-ScriptElem] <String[]>] [[-StyleAttr] <String[]>] 
    [[-StyleElem] <String[]>] [[-Worker] <String[]>] [[-Sandbox] <String>] [[-ReportUri] <String>] 
    [-UpgradeInsecureRequests] [-ReportOnly] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Adds additional values to already defined values for the Content-Security-Policy header, instead of 
    overriding them.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Default <String[]>
        The values to add for the Default portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Child <String[]>
        The values to add for the Child portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    2
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Connect <String[]>
        The values to add for the Connect portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    3
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Font <String[]>
        The values to add for the Font portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    4
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Frame <String[]>
        The values to add for the Frame portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    5
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Image <String[]>
        The values to add for the Image portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    6
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Manifest <String[]>
        The values to add for the Manifest portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    7
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Media <String[]>
        The values to add for the Media portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    8
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Object <String[]>
        The values to add for the Object portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    9
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Scripts <String[]>
        The values to add for the Scripts portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    10
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Style <String[]>
        The values to add for the Style portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    11
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -BaseUri <String[]>
        The values to add for the BaseUri portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    12
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -FormAction <String[]>
        The values to add for the FormAction portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    13
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -FrameAncestor <String[]>
        The values to add for the FrameAncestor portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    14
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -FencedFrame <String[]>
        The values to add for the FencedFrame portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    15
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Prefetch <String[]>
        The values to add for the Prefetch portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    16
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ScriptAttr <String[]>
        The values to add for the ScriptAttr portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    17
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ScriptElem <String[]>
        The values to add for the ScriptElem portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    18
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -StyleAttr <String[]>
        The values to add for the StyleAttr portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    19
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -StyleElem <String[]>
        The values to add for the StyleElem portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    20
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Worker <String[]>
        The values to add for the Worker portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    21
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Sandbox <String>
        The value to use for the Sandbox portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    22
        Default value                None
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ReportUri <String>
        The value to use for the ReportUri portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    23
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -UpgradeInsecureRequests [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the header will have the upgrade-insecure-requests value added.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ReportOnly [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the header will be set as a report-only header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>Add-PodeSecurityContentSecurityPolicy -Default '*.twitter.com' -Image 'data'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    Add-PodeSecurityHeader
    
SYNOPSIS
    Add definition for specified security header.
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodeSecurityHeader [-Name] <String> [[-Value] <String>] [-Append] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Add definition for specified security header.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Name <String>
        The Name of the security header.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Value <String>
        The Value of the security header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    2
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Append [<SwitchParameter>]
        Append the value to the header instead of replacing it
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS

    PS C:\>Add-PodeSecurityHeader -Name 'X-Header-Name' -Value 'SomeValue'

NAME
    Add-PodeSecurityPermissionsPolicy
    
SYNOPSIS
    Adds additional values to already defined values for the Permissions-Policy header.
    
    
SYNTAX
    Add-PodeSecurityPermissionsPolicy [[-Accelerometer] <String[]>] [[-AmbientLightSensor] <String[]>] 
    [[-Autoplay] <String[]>] [[-Battery] <String[]>] [[-Camera] <String[]>] [[-DisplayCapture] <String[]>] 
    [[-DocumentDomain] <String[]>] [[-EncryptedMedia] <String[]>] [[-Fullscreen] <String[]>] [[-Gamepad] 
    <String[]>] [[-Geolocation] <String[]>] [[-Gyroscope] <String[]>] [[-InterestCohort] <String[]>] 
    [[-LayoutAnimations] <String[]>] [[-LegacyImageFormats] <String[]>] [[-Magnetometer] <String[]>] 
    [[-Microphone] <String[]>] [[-Midi] <String[]>] [[-OversizedImages] <String[]>] [[-Payment] <String[]>] 
    [[-PictureInPicture] <String[]>] [[-PublicKeyCredentials] <String[]>] [[-Speakers] <String[]>] 
    [[-SyncXhr] <String[]>] [[-UnoptimisedImages] <String[]>] [[-UnsizedMedia] <String[]>] [[-Usb] 
    <String[]>] [[-ScreenWakeLock] <String[]>] [[-WebShare] <String[]>] [[-XrSpatialTracking] <String[]>] 
    [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Adds additional values to already defined values for the Permissions-Policy header, instead of overriding 
    them.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Accelerometer <String[]>
        The values to add for the Accelerometer portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -AmbientLightSensor <String[]>
        The values to add for the AmbientLightSensor portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    2
        Default value

        The values to add for the Autoplay portion of the header.

    -Battery <String[]>

        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Camera <String[]>
        The values to add for the Camera portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    5
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -DisplayCapture <String[]>
        The values to add for the DisplayCapture portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    6
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -DocumentDomain <String[]>
        The values to add for the DocumentDomain portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    7

        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false

        Position?                    8

        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Fullscreen <String[]>
        The values to add for the Fullscreen portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    9
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Gamepad <String[]>
        The values to add for the Gamepad portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    10
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Geolocation <String[]>
        The values to add for the Geolocation portion of the header.

    -Gyroscope <String[]>

    -InterestCohort <String[]>

    -LayoutAnimations <String[]>

    -LegacyImageFormats <String[]>
        The values to add for the LegacyImageFormats portion of the header.
        
        Required?                    false

    -Magnetometer <String[]>
        The values to add for the Magnetometer portion of the header.

    -Microphone <String[]>

    -Payment <String[]>
        The values to add for the Payment portion of the header.
