        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.String
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>$token = New-PodeCsrfToken
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeJsonSchemaArray
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates an Array JSON Schema type definition.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeJsonSchemaArray -Item <Hashtable> [-MinItems <Int32>] [-MaxItems <Int32>] [-Description <String>] 
    [-Unique] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    This function creates a JSON Schema type definition for an Array type.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Item <Hashtable>
        A hashtable representing the JSON Schema type definition for the items in the array.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MinItems <Int32>
        An optional minimum number of items in the array.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MaxItems <Int32>
        An optional maximum number of items in the array.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Description <String>
        An optional Description.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Unique [<SwitchParameter>]
        An optional switch to indicate if the items in the array must be unique.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create a JSON Schema definition for an array of strings
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaArray -Item (New-PodeJsonSchemaString)
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create a JSON Schema definition for an array of integers with at least 1 item and at most 5 items
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaArray -Item (New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger) -MinItems 1 -MaxItems 5
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create a JSON Schema definition for an array of unique strings with a description
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaArray -Item (New-PodeJsonSchemaString) -Unique
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeJsonSchemaBoolean
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a Boolean JSON Schema type definition.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeJsonSchemaBoolean [[-Constant] <Boolean>] [[-Description] <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    This function creates a JSON Schema type definition for a Boolean type.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Constant <Boolean>
        An optional Constant value.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Description <String>
        An optional Description.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    2
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaBoolean
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaBoolean -Constant $true -Description 'Some property that must be true'

NAME
    New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates an Integer JSON Schema type definition.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger [-MultipleOf <Int32>] [-Minimum <Int32>] [-Maximum <Int32>] [-ExclusiveMinimum] 
    [-ExclusiveMaximum] [-Description <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger [-Constant <String>] [-Description <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger [-Enum <Int32[]>] [-Description <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    This function creates a JSON Schema type definition for an Integer type.
    

PARAMETERS
    -MultipleOf <Int32>
        An optional value that the integer must be a multiple of.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Minimum <Int32>
        An optional minimum value for the integer.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Maximum <Int32>
        An optional maximum value for the integer.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Constant <String>
        An optional Constant value.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Enum <Int32[]>
        An optional array of values that the integer can be.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ExclusiveMinimum [<SwitchParameter>]
        An optional switch to indicate if the minimum value is exclusive.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ExclusiveMaximum [<SwitchParameter>]
        An optional switch to indicate if the maximum value is exclusive.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Description <String>
        An optional Description.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger -Minimum 0 -Maximum 100 -Description 'A percentage of some value'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger -Enum 1, 2, 4, 8 -Description 'Number of CPU cores to use'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 4 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger -MultipleOf 5 -Description 'A value that must be a multiple of 5'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 5 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger -Minimum 0 -ExclusiveMinimum -Description 'A value that must be greater 
    than 0'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 6 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger -Maximum 100 -ExclusiveMaximum -Description 'A value that must be less 
    than 100'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeJsonSchemaNull

INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaNull
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaNull -Description 'This is a null type'

NAME
    New-PodeJsonSchemaNumber
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a Number JSON Schema type definition.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeJsonSchemaNumber [-MultipleOf <Double>] [-Minimum <Double>] [-Maximum <Double>] 
    [-ExclusiveMinimum] [-ExclusiveMaximum] [-Description <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaNumber [-Constant <String>] [-Description <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaNumber [-Enum <Double[]>] [-Description <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    This function creates a JSON Schema type definition for a Number type.
    

PARAMETERS
    -MultipleOf <Double>
        An optional value that the number must be a multiple of.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Minimum <Double>
        An optional minimum value for the number.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Maximum <Double>
        An optional maximum value for the number.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Constant <String>
        An optional Constant value.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Enum <Double[]>
        An optional array of values that the number can be.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ExclusiveMinimum [<SwitchParameter>]
        An optional switch to indicate if the minimum value is exclusive.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ExclusiveMaximum [<SwitchParameter>]
        An optional switch to indicate if the maximum value is exclusive.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Description <String>
        An optional Description.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaNumber
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaNumber -Minimum 0.0 -Maximum 1.0 -Description 'A ratio between 0 and 1'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaNumber -Enum 3.14, 2.718, 1.618 -Description 'Some famous mathematical constants'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 4 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaNumber -MultipleOf 0.01 -Description 'A value that must be a multiple of 0.01'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 5 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaNumber -Minimum 0.0 -ExclusiveMinimum -Description 'A value that must be greater 
    than 0.0'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 6 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaNumber -Maximum 100.0 -ExclusiveMaximum -Description 'A value that must be less 
    than 100.0'

NAME
    New-PodeJsonSchemaObject
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates an Object JSON Schema type definition.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeJsonSchemaObject [[-Property] <Hashtable[]>] [[-MinProperties] <Int32>] [[-MaxProperties] 
    <Int32>] [[-Description] <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    This function creates a JSON Schema type definition for an Object type.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Property <Hashtable[]>
        A hashtable representing the JSON Schema property definition for a property of the object.
        This parameter can be specified multiple times to define multiple properties.
        Property definitions should be created using the New-PodeJsonSchemaProperty function.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MinProperties <Int32>
        An optional minimum number of properties in the object.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    2
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MaxProperties <Int32>
        An optional maximum number of properties in the object.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    3
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Description <String>
        An optional description.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    4
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create a JSON Schema definition for an object with a required string property "name" and an 
    optional integer property "age"
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaObject -Property @(
        (New-PodeJsonSchemaProperty -Name 'name' -Definition (New-PodeJsonSchemaString) -Required),
        (New-PodeJsonSchemaProperty -Name 'age' -Definition (New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger))
    ) -Description 'A person object with a required name and an optional age'
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create a JSON Schema definition for an object with no properties, but a description - can accept 
    any number of properties
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaObject -Description 'An empty object with a description'
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create a JSON Schema definition for an object with a minimum of 1 property and a maximum of 5 
    properties
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaObject -MinProperties 1 -MaxProperties 5
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeJsonSchemaProperty
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a JSON Schema property definition for use in an object schema.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeJsonSchemaProperty [-Name] <String> [-Definition] <Hashtable> [-Required] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    This function creates a JSON Schema property definition for use in an object schema.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Name <String>
        The name of the property.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Definition <Hashtable>
        A hashtable representing the JSON Schema type definition for the property.
        This should be created using one of the other New-PodeJsonSchema* functions.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    2
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       true (ByValue)
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Required [<SwitchParameter>]
        Indicates whether the property is required.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create a JSON Schema property definition for a required string property "name" with a description
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaProperty -Name 'name' -Definition (
        New-PodeJsonSchemaString -Description 'The name of the person'
    ) -Required
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create a JSON Schema property definition for an optional integer property "age" with a 
    description
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaProperty -Name 'age' -Definition (
        New-PodeJsonSchemaInteger -Description 'The age of the person'
    )
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create a JSON Schema property definition for a required array property "tags" with a 
    description, where the items in the array must be unique strings
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaProperty -Name 'tags' -Definition (
        New-PodeJsonSchemaArray -Unique -Item (
            New-PodeJsonSchemaString
        ) -Description 'An array of unique tags for the person'
    ) -Required
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 4 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create a JSON Schema property definition for an optional property "metadata" with a description, 
    where the value can be any object with a minimum of 1 property
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaProperty -Name 'metadata' -Definition (
        New-PodeJsonSchemaObject -MinProperties 1 -Description 'Additional metadata about the person'
    )
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS
    https://json-schema.org/understanding-json-schema/reference/type





NAME
    New-PodeJsonSchemaString
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a String JSON Schema type definition.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeJsonSchemaString [-Pattern <String>] [-MinLength <Int32>] [-MaxLength <Int32>] [-Description 
    <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaString [-Constant <String>] [-Description <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeJsonSchemaString [-Enum <String[]>] [-Description <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    This function creates a JSON Schema type definition for a String type.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Pattern <String>
        An optional regular expression pattern that the string must match.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MinLength <Int32>
        An optional minimum length for the string.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MaxLength <Int32>
        An optional maximum length for the string.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Constant <String>
        An optional Constant value.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Enum <String[]>
        An optional array of values that the string can be.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Description <String>
        An optional Description.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaString
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaString -Pattern '^[a-zA-Z0-9]+$' -Description 'A string that must be 
    alphanumeric'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaString -MinLength 5 -MaxLength 10 -Description 'A string that must be between 5 
    and 10 characters long'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 4 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaString -Enum 'red', 'green', 'blue' -Description 'A string that must be one of 
    the specified colours'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 5 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeJsonSchemaString -Constant 'fixed value' -Description 'A string that must be exactly 
    "fixed value"'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeLimitEndpointComponent
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a new Limit Endpoint component.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeLimitEndpointComponent [[-Name] <String[]>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Creates a new Limit Endpoint component. This supports the WebEvent, SmtpEvent, and TcpEvent endpoints.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Name <String[]>
        The endpoint name(s) to check.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    A hashtable containing the options and scriptblock for the endpoint component.
    The scriptblock will return the endpoint name if found, or null if not.
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitEndpointComponent
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitEndpointComponent -Name 'api'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeLimitHeaderComponent
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a new Limit Header component.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeLimitHeaderComponent [-Name] <String[]> [[-Value] <String[]>] [-Group] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Creates a new Limit Header component. This support WebEvent and SmtpEvent headers.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Name <String[]>
        The name of the header(s) to check.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Value <String[]>
        The value of the header(s) to check.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    2
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Group [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the headers will be grouped by name, ignoring the value.
        For example, any headers matching "X-AuthToken" will be grouped as "X-AuthToken", and not 
        "X-AuthToken=123".
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    A hashtable containing the options and scriptblock for the header component.
    The scriptblock will return the header name and value if found, or just the name if Group is supplied.
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitHeaderComponent -Name 'X-AuthToken'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitHeaderComponent -Name 'X-AuthToken', 'X-AuthKey'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitHeaderComponent -Name 'X-AuthToken' -Value '12345'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 4 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitHeaderComponent -Name 'X-AuthToken' -Group
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeLimitIPComponent
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a new Limit IP component.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeLimitIPComponent [[-IP] <String[]>] [[-Location] <String>] [[-XForwardedForType] <String>] 
    [-Group] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Creates a new Limit IP component. This supports the WebEvent, SmtpEvent, and TcpEvent IPs.
    

PARAMETERS
    -IP <String[]>
        The IP address(es) to check. Supports raw IPs, subnets, local, and any.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Location <String>
        Where to get the IP from: RemoteAddress or XForwardedFor. (Default: RemoteAddress)
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    2
        Default value                RemoteAddress
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XForwardedForType <String>
        If the Location is XForwardedFor, which IP in the X-Forwarded-For header to use: Leftmost, Rightmost, 
        or All. (Default: Leftmost)
        If Leftmost, the first IP in the X-Forwarded-For header will be used.
        If Rightmost, the last IP in the X-Forwarded-For header will be used.
        If All, all IPs in the X-Forwarded-For header will be used - at least one must match.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    3
        Default value                Leftmost
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Group [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, IPs in a subnet will be treated as a single entity.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    A hashtable containing the options and scriptblock for the IP component.
    The scriptblock will return the IP - or subnet for grouped - if found, or null if not.
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitIPComponent
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitIPComponent -IP '127.0.0.1'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitIPComponent -IP '10.0.0.0/24'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 4 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitIPComponent -IP 'localhost'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 5 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitIPComponent -IP 'all'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 6 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitIPComponent -IP '192.0.1.0/16' -Group
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 7 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitIPComponent -IP '10.0.0.1' -Location XForwardedFor
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 8 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitIPComponent -IP '192.0.1.0/16' -Group -Location XForwardedFor -XForwardedForType 
    Rightmost
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeLimitMethodComponent
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a new Limit HTTP Method component.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeLimitMethodComponent [[-Method] <String[]>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Creates a new Limit HTTP Method component. This supports the WebEvent methods.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Method <String[]>
        The HTTP method(s) to check.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    A hashtable containing the options and scriptblock for the method component.
    The scriptblock will return the method if found, or null if not.
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitMethodComponent
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitMethodComponent -Method 'Get'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitMethodComponent -Method 'Get', 'Post'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeLimitRouteComponent
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a new Limit Route component.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeLimitRouteComponent [[-Path] <String[]>] [-Group] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Creates a new Limit Route component. This supports the WebEvent routes.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Path <String[]>
        The route path(s) to check. This can be a full path, or a wildcard path.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Group [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the routes will be grouped by any wildcard, ignoring the full path.
        For example, any routes matching "/api/*" will be grouped as "/api/*", and not "/api/test" or 
        "/api/test/hello".
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    A hashtable containing the options and scriptblock for the route component.
    The scriptblock will return the route path if found, or null if not.
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitRouteComponent -Path '/downloads'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitRouteComponent -Path '/downloads', '/api/*'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLimitRouteComponent -Path '/api/*' -Group
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeLockable
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a new custom Lockable object.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeLockable [-Name] <String> [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Creates a new custom Lockable object for use with Lock-PodeObject, and Enter/Exit-PodeLockable.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Name <String>
        The Name of the Lockable object.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeLockable -Name 'Lock1'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeLoggingMethod
    
SYNOPSIS
    Create a new method of outputting logs.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeLoggingMethod [-Terminal] [-Batch <Int32>] [-BatchTimeout <Int32>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeLoggingMethod [-File] [-Path <String>] -Name <String> [-Batch <Int32>] [-BatchTimeout <Int32>] 
    [-MaxDays <Int32>] [-MaxSize <Int32>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeLoggingMethod [-EventViewer] [-EventLogName <String>] [-Source <String>] [-EventID <Int32>] 
    [-Batch <Int32>] [-BatchTimeout <Int32>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeLoggingMethod [-Batch <Int32>] [-BatchTimeout <Int32>] [-Custom] -ScriptBlock <ScriptBlock> 
    [-ArgumentList <Object[]>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Create a new method of outputting logs.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Terminal [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, will use the inbuilt Terminal logging output method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -File [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, will use the inbuilt File logging output method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Path <String>
        The File Path of where to store the logs.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                ./logs
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Name <String>
        The File Name to prepend new log files using.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -EventViewer [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, will use the inbuilt Event Viewer logging output method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -EventLogName <String>
        Optional Log Name for the Event Viewer (Default: Application)
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                Application
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Source <String>
        Optional Source for the Event Viewer (Default: Pode)
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                Pode
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -EventID <Int32>
        Optional EventID for the Event Viewer (Default: 0)
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Batch <Int32>
        An optional batch size to write log items in bulk (Default: 1)
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                1
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -BatchTimeout <Int32>
        An optional batch timeout, in seconds, to send items off for writing if a log item isn't received 
        (Default: 0)
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MaxDays <Int32>
        The maximum number of days to keep logs, before Pode automatically removes them.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MaxSize <Int32>
        The maximum size of a log file, before Pode starts writing to a new log file.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Custom [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, will allow you to create a Custom Logging output method.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ScriptBlock <ScriptBlock>
        The ScriptBlock that defines how to output a log item.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ArgumentList <Object[]>
        An array of arguments to supply to the Custom Logging output method's ScriptBlock.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>$term_logging = New-PodeLoggingMethod -Terminal
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>$file_logging = New-PodeLoggingMethod -File -Path ./logs -Name 'requests'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>$custom_logging = New-PodeLoggingMethod -Custom -ScriptBlock { /* logic */ }
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeMcpAudioContent
    
SYNOPSIS
    Builds an Audio response object for an MCP tool, which can be returned to the client.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeMcpAudioContent [[-Bytes] <Byte[]>] [-MimeType] <String> [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    This function creates a hashtable representing an audio response for an MCP tool. The hashtable includes a
    'type' key with the value 'audio', a 'data' key containing the base64-encoded audio data, and a 
    'mimeType' key
    specifying the MIME type of the audio.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Bytes <Byte[]>
        The byte array representing the audio data.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MimeType <String>
        The MIME type of the audio.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    2
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create an audio response for an MCP tool
    
    $audioBytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('path\to\audio.mp3')
    New-PodeMcpAudioContent -Bytes $audioBytes -MimeType 'audio/mpeg'
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeMcpImageContent
    
SYNOPSIS
    Builds an Image response object for an MCP tool, which can be returned to the client.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeMcpImageContent [[-Bytes] <Byte[]>] [-MimeType] <String> [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    This function creates a hashtable representing an image response for an MCP tool. The hashtable includes a
    'type' key with the value 'image', a 'data' key containing the base64-encoded image data, and a 
    'mimeType' key
    specifying the MIME type of the image.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Bytes <Byte[]>
        The byte array representing the image data.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MimeType <String>
        The MIME type of the image.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    2
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create an image response for an MCP tool
    
    $imageBytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes('path\to\image.png')
    New-PodeMcpImageContent -Bytes $imageBytes -MimeType 'image/png'
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeMcpTextContent
    
SYNOPSIS
    Builds a Textual response object for an MCP tool, which can be returned to the client.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeMcpTextContent [[-Value] <Object>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    This function creates a hashtable representing a textual response for an MCP tool. The hashtable includes 
    a
    'type' key with the value 'text', and a 'text' key containing the provided value. If the provided value 
    is not a string,
    it will be converted to a string using Out-String.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Value <Object>
        The value to be included in the textual response. This can be any object, which will be converted to 
        a string if necessary.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    System.Collections.Hashtable
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create a simple text response for an MCP tool
    
    New-PodeMcpTextContent -Value 'Hello, world!'
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\># create a text response for an MCP tool from a non-string object
    
    $data = @{ Name = 'Alice'; Age = 30 }
    New-PodeMcpTextContent -Value $data
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeMiddleware
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a new Middleware HashTable object, that can be piped/used in Add-PodeMiddleware or in Routes.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeMiddleware [-ScriptBlock] <ScriptBlock> [-Route <String>] [-ArgumentList <Object[]>] 
    [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Creates a new Middleware HashTable object, that can be piped/used in Add-PodeMiddleware or in Routes. 
    ScriptBlock should return $true to continue execution, or $false to stop.
    

PARAMETERS
    -ScriptBlock <ScriptBlock>
        The Script that defines the logic of the Middleware. Should return $true to continue execution, or 
        $false to stop.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       true (ByValue)
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Route <String>
        A Route path for which Routes this Middleware should only be invoked against.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ArgumentList <Object[]>
        An array of arguments to supply to the Middleware's ScriptBlock.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    Boolean. ScriptBlock should return $true to continue to the next middleware/route, or return $false to 
    stop execution.
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeMiddleware -ScriptBlock { /* logic */ } -ArgumentList 'Email' | Add-PodeMiddleware -Name 
    'CheckEmail'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeMutex
    
SYNOPSIS
    Create a new Mutex.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeMutex [-Name] <String> [[-Scope] <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Create a new Mutex.
    

PARAMETERS
    -Name <String>
        The Name of the Mutex.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Scope <String>
        The Scope of the Mutex, can be either Self, Local, or Global. (Default: Self)
        Self: The current process, or child processes.
        Local: All processes for the current login session on Windows, or the the same as Self on Unix.
        Global: All processes on the system, across every session.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    2
        Default value                Self
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeMutex -Name 'SelfMutex'
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 2 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeMutex -Name 'LocalMutex' -Scope Local
    
    
    
    
    
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 3 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeMutex -Name 'GlobalMutex' -Scope Global
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS





NAME
    New-PodeOABoolProperty
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a new OpenAPI boolean property.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeOABoolProperty [[-ParamsList] <Hashtable[]>] [-Name <String>] [-Default <String>] [-Description 
    <String>] [-ExternalDoc <String>] [-Example <Object>] [-Enum <String[]>] [-Required] [-Deprecated] 
    [-Object] [-Nullable] [-ReadOnly] [-WriteOnly] [-NoAdditionalProperties] [-AdditionalProperties 
    <Hashtable>] [-XmlName <String>] [-XmlNamespace <String>] [-XmlPrefix <String>] [-XmlAttribute] 
    [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeOABoolProperty [[-ParamsList] <Hashtable[]>] [-Name <String>] [-Default <String>] [-Description 
    <String>] [-ExternalDoc <String>] [-Example <Object>] [-Enum <String[]>] [-Required] [-Deprecated] 
    [-Object] [-Nullable] [-ReadOnly] [-WriteOnly] [-NoAdditionalProperties] [-AdditionalProperties 
    <Hashtable>] [-XmlName <String>] [-XmlNamespace <String>] [-XmlPrefix <String>] [-XmlAttribute] 
    [-XmlItemName <String>] [-XmlWrapped] -Array [-UniqueItems] [-MinItems <Int32>] [-MaxItems <Int32>] 
    [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Creates a new OpenAPI boolean property, for Schemas or Parameters.
    

PARAMETERS
    -ParamsList <Hashtable[]>
        Used to pipeline multiple properties
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    1
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       true (ByValue)
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Name <String>
        The Name of the property.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Default <String>
        The default value of the property. (Default: $false)
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Description <String>
        A Description of the property.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ExternalDoc <String>
        If supplied, add an additional external documentation for this operation.
        The parameter is created by Add-PodeOAExternalDoc
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Example <Object>
        An example of a parameter value
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Enum <String[]>
        An optional array of values that this property can only be set to.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Required [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the object will be treated as Required where supported.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Deprecated [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the object will be treated as Deprecated where supported.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Object [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the boolean will be automatically wrapped in an object.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Nullable [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the boolean will be treated as Nullable.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ReadOnly [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the boolean will be included in a response but not in a request
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -WriteOnly [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the boolean will be included in a request but not in a response
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -NoAdditionalProperties [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, will configure the OpenAPI property additionalProperties to false.
        This means that the defined object will not allow any properties beyond those explicitly declared in 
        its schema.
        If any additional properties are provided, they will be considered invalid.
        Use this switch to enforce a strict schema definition, ensuring that objects contain only the 
        specified set of properties and no others.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -AdditionalProperties <Hashtable>
        Define a set of additional properties for the OpenAPI schema. This parameter accepts a HashTable 
        where each key-value pair represents a property name and its corresponding schema.
        The schema for each property can include type, format, description, and other OpenAPI specification 
        attributes.
        When specified, these additional properties are included in the OpenAPI definition, allowing for more 
        flexible and dynamic object structures.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XmlName <String>
        By default, XML elements get the same names that fields in the API declaration have. This property 
        change the XML name of the property
        reflecting the 'xml.name' attribute in the OpenAPI specification.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XmlNamespace <String>
        Defines a specific XML namespace for the property, corresponding to the 'xml.namespace' attribute in 
        OpenAPI.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XmlPrefix <String>
        Sets a prefix for the XML element name, aligning with the 'xml.prefix' attribute in OpenAPI.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XmlAttribute [<SwitchParameter>]
        Indicates whether the property should be serialized as an XML attribute, equivalent to the 
        'xml.attribute' attribute in OpenAPI.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XmlItemName <String>
        Specifically for properties treated as arrays, it defines the XML name for each item in the array. 
        This parameter aligns with the 'xml.name' attribute under 'items' in OpenAPI.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XmlWrapped [<SwitchParameter>]
        Indicates whether array items should be wrapped in an XML element, similar to the 'xml.wrapped' 
        attribute in OpenAPI.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Array [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the object will be treated as an array of objects.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -UniqueItems [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, specify that all items in the array must be unique
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MinItems <Int32>
        If supplied, specify minimum length of an array
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MaxItems <Int32>
        If supplied, specify maximum length of an array
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeOABoolProperty -Name 'enabled' -Required
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS
    https://swagger.io/docs/specification/basic-structure/
    https://swagger.io/docs/specification/data-models/





NAME
    New-PodeOAComponentSchemaProperty
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates a OpenAPI schema reference property.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeOAComponentSchemaProperty [-ParamsList <Hashtable[]>] [-Name <String>] -Reference <String> 
    [-XmlName <String>] [-XmlNamespace <String>] [-XmlPrefix <String>] [-XmlAttribute] [-Example <Object>] 
    [-Deprecated] [-Required] [-Nullable] [-ReadOnly] [-WriteOnly] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeOAComponentSchemaProperty [-ParamsList <Hashtable[]>] [-Name <String>] -Reference <String> 
    [-Description <String>] [-XmlName <String>] [-XmlNamespace <String>] [-XmlPrefix <String>] 
    [-XmlAttribute] [-Example <Object>] [-Deprecated] [-Required] [-Nullable] [-ReadOnly] [-WriteOnly] 
    [-XmlItemName <String>] [-XmlWrapped] -Array [-UniqueItems] [-MinItems <Int32>] [-MaxItems <Int32>] 
    [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    Creates a new OpenAPI component schema reference from another OpenAPI schema.
    

PARAMETERS
    -ParamsList <Hashtable[]>
        Used to pipeline multiple properties
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       true (ByValue)
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Name <String>
        The Name of the property.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Reference <String>
        An component schema name.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Description <String>
        A Description of the property.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XmlName <String>
        By default, XML elements get the same names that fields in the API declaration have. This property 
        change the XML name of the property
        reflecting the 'xml.name' attribute in the OpenAPI specification.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XmlNamespace <String>
        Defines a specific XML namespace for the property, corresponding to the 'xml.namespace' attribute in 
        OpenAPI.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XmlPrefix <String>
        Sets a prefix for the XML element name, aligning with the 'xml.prefix' attribute in OpenAPI.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XmlAttribute [<SwitchParameter>]
        Indicates whether the property should be serialized as an XML attribute, equivalent to the 
        'xml.attribute' attribute in OpenAPI.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Example <Object>
        An example of a parameter value
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Deprecated [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the schema will be treated as Deprecated where supported.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Required [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the object will be treated as Required where supported.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Nullable [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the schema will be treated as Nullable.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -ReadOnly [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the schema will be included in a response but not in a request
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -WriteOnly [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the schema will be included in a request but not in a response
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XmlItemName <String>
        Specifically for properties treated as arrays, it defines the XML name for each item in the array. 
        This parameter aligns with the 'xml.name' attribute under 'items' in OpenAPI.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -XmlWrapped [<SwitchParameter>]
        Indicates whether array items should be wrapped in an XML element, similar to the 'xml.wrapped' 
        attribute in OpenAPI.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Array [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, the schema will be treated as an array of objects.
        
        Required?                    true
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -UniqueItems [<SwitchParameter>]
        If supplied, specify that all items in the array must be unique
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                False
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MinItems <Int32>
        If supplied, specify minimum length of an array
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -MaxItems <Int32>
        If supplied, specify maximum length of an array
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                0
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    <CommonParameters>
        This cmdlet supports the common parameters: Verbose, Debug,
        ErrorAction, ErrorVariable, WarningAction, WarningVariable,
        OutBuffer, PipelineVariable, and OutVariable. For more information, see 
        about_CommonParameters (https:/go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=113216). 
    
INPUTS
    
OUTPUTS
    
    -------------------------- EXAMPLE 1 --------------------------
    
    PS C:\>New-PodeOAComponentSchemaProperty -Name 'Config' -Component "MyConfigSchema"
    
    
    
    
    
    
    
RELATED LINKS
    https://swagger.io/docs/specification/basic-structure/
    https://swagger.io/docs/specification/data-models/





NAME
    New-PodeOAContentMediaType
    
SYNOPSIS
    Creates media content type definitions for OpenAPI specifications.
    
    
SYNTAX
    New-PodeOAContentMediaType [-ContentType <String[]>] [-Content <Object>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeOAContentMediaType [-ContentType <String[]>] [-Content <Object>] -Array [-UniqueItems] [-MinItems 
    <Int32>] [-MaxItems <Int32>] [-Title <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    New-PodeOAContentMediaType [-ContentType <String[]>] [-Content <Object>] -Upload [-ContentEncoding 
    <String>] [-PartContentMediaType <String>] [<CommonParameters>]
    
    
DESCRIPTION
    The New-PodeOAContentMediaType function generates media content type definitions suitable for use in 
    OpenAPI specifications. It supports various media types and allows for the specification of content as 
    either a single object or an array of objects.
    

PARAMETERS
    -ContentType <String[]>
        An array of strings specifying the media types to be defined. Media types should conform to standard 
        MIME types (e.g., 'application/json', 'image/png'). The function validates these media types against 
        a regular expression to ensure they are properly formatted.
        
        Alias: MediaType
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                */*
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Content <Object>
        The content definition for the media type. This could be an object representing the structure of the 
        content expected for the specified media types.
        
        Required?                    false
        Position?                    named
        Default value                
        Accept pipeline input?       false
        Accept wildcard characters?  false
        
    -Array [<SwitchParameter>]
        A switch parameter, used in the 'Array' parameter set, to indicate that the content should be treated 
        as an array.
        
        Required?                    true
